items.title: 主线结论（系统版｜条件触发）
items.summary:
- 主导因子：10年期利率 + 原油价格/风险事件
- 四件套监控：10年期利率（方向/拐点）｜美元指数（强弱）｜VIX（是否抬升）｜原油价格/风险事件（是否升级）
- 跨资产联动：10年期利率上升→NQ/ES承压更明显；美元指数上升→黄金更易回撤；VIX上升→盘中更易急拉急杀/假突破
- 未来90分钟关键窗口：关注是否临近数据/讲话/美债拍卖/开盘等事件窗；事件前后避免追单
- 情景A：若10年期利率继续上行且VIX抬升→偏NQ/ES先空后看、GC偏弱震荡；操作偏好：等确认后顺势
- 情景B：若10年期利率回落且VIX回落→偏NQ/ES修复反弹、GC喘息；操作偏好：回踩参与、避免追高
- 期权：事件密度高→偏买波动/带保护；事件窗过去且VIX回落→再
items.summary_en:
- 主导因子：10Y/利率 + 原油/风险事件
- 四件套监控：10Y（方向/拐点）｜DXY（强弱）｜VIX（是否抬升）｜原油/风险事件（是否升级）
- 跨资产联动：10Y↑→NQ/ES承压更明显；DXY↑→GC更易回撤；VIX↑→盘中更易急拉急杀/假突破
- 未来90分钟关键窗口：关注是否临近数据/讲话/美债拍卖/开盘等事件窗；事件前后避免追单
- 情景A：若10Y继续上行且VIX抬升→偏NQ/ES先空后看、GC偏弱震荡；操作偏好：等确认后顺势
- 情景B：若10Y回落且VIX回落→偏NQ/ES修复反弹、GC喘息；操作偏好：回踩参与、避免追高
- 期权：事件密度高→偏买波动/带保护；事件窗过去且VIX回落→再考虑卖波动
- ——
- 地缘/避险线索：Stock market today: Dow, S&P 500, Nasdaq futures waver as Iran officials…
- 宏观/Fed线索：HELOC and home equity loan rates Monday, March 23, 2026: Do you want a f…

items.title: OpenAI 在即将上市前的一份投资者文件中指出，Microsoft 依赖性是其风险之一。
items.summary: OpenAI在一份类似IPO招股说明书的文件中，突出了其对Microsoft的依赖风险，以及对TSMC供应链的中断风险。
items.title_en: OpenAI calls out Microsoft reliance as risk in investor document ahead of expected IPO
items.summary_en: In a document that resembles an IPO prospectus, OpenAI highlighted the risk of its dependence on Microsoft and of supply disruptions at TSMC.

items.title_en: Japan reports lower-than-expected core inflation for February, headline CPI eases for a fourth month
items.summary_en: The consumer price index fell to 1.3% last month, its lowest level since March 2022 and below the central bank's 2% target. It was down from 1.5% in January.

items.summary_en: Oil prices traded higher on Tuesday, with international benchmark Brent crude climbing back above $100 per barrel.

items.title: 10年期国债收益率微升，投资者因伊朗战争再次升温而心存疑虑。
items.summary: 10年期国债收益率周二上涨，因为石油市场的持续波动和中东局势的持续紧张使投资者保持谨慎。
items.title_en: 10-year Treasury yields edge higher as investors weigh renewed Iran war uncertainty
items.summary_en: The 10-year Treasury yield rose on Tuesday as renewed volatility in oil markets and lingering Middle East tensions kept investors on edge.

items.summary_en: Shares listed in Europe traded in mixed territory on Tuesday, as investors continue to monitor developments in the Middle East.

items.title: 亚马逊面临中东地区AWS服务进一步中断的风险，原因是伊朗冲突
items.summary: 亚马逊云服务（AWS）因中东地区持续冲突，第二次在巴林面临服务中断。
items.title_en: Amazon faces further AWS disruption in the Middle East from Iran conflict
items.summary_en: AWS is facing more service disruptions in Bahrain as a result of the ongoing conflict ‌in the Middle East, marking the second such disruptions this month.

items.title: 亚太市场部分收回涨幅 因油价因伊朗战争相关不确定性反弹
items.summary: 亚太市场上涨，但后期回落，油价反弹凸显中东冲突走向的不确定性。
items.title_en: Asia-Pacific markets pare gains as oil rebounds on Iran war-linked uncertainty
items.summary_en: Asia-Pacific markets rose but pared earlier gains as oil prices rebounded, underscoring lingering uncertainty over the trajectory of the Middle East conflict.

items.title: 川普改变了对伊朗的态度
items.summary: 全球市场见到了一丝缓解，美国总统唐纳德·特朗普表示与德黑兰的谈判取得了积极进展。
items.title_en: CNBC Daily Open: Trump takes off-ramp on Iran ultimatum
items.summary_en: Global markets see some reprieve, after U.S. President Donald Trump signals positive discussions with Tehran.

items.title: 布伦特原油价格在盘后反弹，重新突破100美元大关。
items.summary: 全球石油价格在周一晚间交易中略微上涨，试图弥补白天交易中接近11%的损失，交易员们正准备迎接可能又一天由伊朗冲突发展所驱动的市场。
items.title_en: Brent oil prices claw back losses to top $100 again after hours
items.summary_en: Global oil prices edged higher in after-hours trading Monday to recoup portion of the nearly 11% lost during the regular session, as traders geared up for what’s likely to be another day driven by developments in the Iran conflict.

items.title: 伊朗在霍尔木兹海峡的袭击是“对每个国家的经济恐怖主义”，阿联酋石油CEO说。
items.summary: 阿联酋国有石油公司的CEO阿尔贾贝尔称，霍尔木兹海峡必须重新开放以解决供应冲击。
items.title_en: Iran attacks in Strait of Hormuz are ‘economic terrorism against every nation,’ UAE oil CEO says
items.summary_en: Sultan Ahmed Al Jaber, CEO of the UAE's state-owned oil company, said the Strait of Hormuz must re-open to resolve the supply shock.

items.title: 旅行股中，特朗普与伊朗谈判的谣言使得这些股票大幅上涨。
items.summary: 旅行相关股价如航空公司和游轮公司周一大涨，因为美国总统唐纳德·特朗普延迟了对伊朗的更多制裁的期限，称两国进行了“非常好的和有生产力的”谈判——但伊朗媒体报道否认了这一点。
items.title_en: Travel stocks are among the biggest gainers as Trump teases Iran talks
items.summary_en: Travel-related stocks such as airlines and cruise companies rallied Monday after President Donald Trump postponed his deadline for more strikes in Iran, saying the two countries had held “very good and productive” talks — something Iranian media reports rebuffed.

items.title: 亚洲希望通过减少对中东的依赖，通过伊朗战争后增加美国的石油和天然气供应。布格曼说。
items.summary: 日本、韩国和台湾高度依赖通过霍尔木兹海峡的出口。
items.title_en: Asia wants more U.S. oil and gas to reduce Middle East dependence after Iran war, Burgum says
items.summary_en: Japan, South Korea and Taiwan rely heavily on exports through the Strait of Hormuz.

items.title: 特朗普的市场扭转帖子发表前，股指期货和石油期货的交易量大幅上升。

items.title: 雪佛龙CEO表示，伊朗战争对油价的影响尚未完全反映在市场中，交易者有“极少信息”。
items.summary: 雪佛龙（Chevron）CEO迈克·沃斯（Mike Wirth）表示，石油的实物供应比石油期货市场所示的要紧张得多。
items.title_en: Chevron CEO says Iran war impact isn't fully priced into oil market, traders have ‘scant information’
items.summary_en: Chevron CEO Mike Wirth said the physical supply of oil is much tighter than the oil futures market suggests.

items.title: 石油价格暴跌近11%，因为特朗普暂停了对伊朗能源基础设施的五天时间内的美国军事袭击计划。

items.summary_en: President Donald Trump said Monday that the U.S. and Iran had productive talks over the weekend about ending the war.
